action_set_definitions.name: get_defect_manifestation
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the quantitative measurement of the reported defect and identifies the specific inspection unit used for the measurement.

station_id.description: The identifier of the production station (e.g., 'MAKINO-B2').

action_set_definitions.name: inspect_machine_configuration
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the current operational settings and tool parameters for a machining center.

station_id.description: The identifier of the machining center.

action_set_definitions.name: capture_telemetry_snapshot
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves real-time sensor data and the current material batch identifier from the station.

action_set_definitions.name: retrieve_material_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves metallurgical properties for a specific batch of raw material.

action_set_definitions.name: query_maintenance_history
action_set_definitions.description: Accesses historical service logs for specific production equipment.

equipment_id.description: The ID of the machine or station.

action_set_definitions.name: get_metrology_validation_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves reliability metrics for the quality inspection system, including GR&R index and collision/calibration events.

inspection_unit_id.description: The identifier of the measurement/CMM unit.

action_set_definitions.name: submit_root_cause_analysis
action_set_definitions.description: Submits the final root cause diagnosis and necessary corrective actions for both production and inspection.

physical_mechanism.description: Description of the physical cause (e.g., thermal expansion or tool deflection).

machining_corrective_action.description: Required fix for the machining process.

metrology_corrective_action.description: Required fix or calibration for the measurement system.

state_description.defect_manifestation: The specific quality issue observed in the final product (e.g., 'Surface Scratches').
state_description.production_line_config: Current settings for the machinery involved in the production process.
state_description.sensor_telemetry_snapshot: The 'ground truth' values of internal sensors, including potential anomalies.
state_description.maintenance_records: Historical log of repairs and inspections performed on the equipment.
state_description.true_root_cause: The hidden actual cause of the defect (must NOT be revealed in observations).
state_description.material_batch_data: Properties of the raw materials used in the current batch.

task_initial_state.defect_manifestation: Cylindricity failure (20.5μm) on Bearing Bore-B; measurements indicate a consistent elliptical distortion, but recent metrology runs show high variance between successive checks.

maintenance_records.action: CMM Stylus (Ruby 2mm) replaced after operator-reported soft-collision during manual alignment.
Routine filter swap on high-pressure coolant system.

task_initial_state.true_root_cause: A partially clogged coolant nozzle is starving the Y-axis lead screw of thermal regulation, causing localized thermal expansion (51.2C vs 24.5C) and resultant pitch error. However, the investigation is currently obscured by an uncalibrated CMM stylus (18.2% GR&R) which prevents reliable confirmation of the error pattern until a Type 1 Gauge Study and recalibration are performed.
